verdict.answer_first: Tie: both state the command immediately: "On macOS: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill".
verdict.decisiveness: B is more focused; A gives the answer but then surveys extras: "Quick variants" and "Want me to run it?".
verdict.fabrication: B likely invents/overstates behavior: "xargs runs no command (harmless)" is not reliably true on macOS; A also has a shaky guard claim: "avoids xargs erroring on no match".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it gives the main command, force option, and inspect-first command without extra variants.
